# Agent Skills Reference Snapshot

This directory contains BitSearch-maintained summaries of the first-party `agentskills.io` documentation pages that informed the current skill template design.

These are distilled snapshots, not verbatim mirrors. Each page note records the source URL, the retrieval date, and the local design implications for BitSearch.

## Retrieved pages

- [home.md](home.md) - overview, interoperability goals, supported ecosystem
- [what-are-skills.md](what-are-skills.md) - progressive disclosure model and minimal skill structure
- [specification.md](specification.md) - frontmatter fields, directory layout, validation
- [skill-creation-quickstart.md](skill-creation-quickstart.md) - minimal skill example and discovery flow
- [skill-creation-best-practices.md](skill-creation-best-practices.md) - coherent units, defaults, gotchas, validation loops
- [skill-creation-optimizing-descriptions.md](skill-creation-optimizing-descriptions.md) - description tuning and trigger evals
- [skill-creation-evaluating-skills.md](skill-creation-evaluating-skills.md) - output-quality evals and iteration
- [skill-creation-using-scripts.md](skill-creation-using-scripts.md) - optional scripts, help text, structured output
- [client-implementation-adding-skills-support.md](client-implementation-adding-skills-support.md) - `.agents/skills/` discovery and client integration rules
- [bitsearch-adoption-notes.md](bitsearch-adoption-notes.md) - BitSearch-specific synthesis and adopted decisions
